name: Caitlyn for California
subject: I am the only candidate standing with Law Enforcement
body:
| | Friend, I am truly honored to have been **the only Gubernatorial candidate** invited to speak at an event today with the **Sheriff of LA County and the DA of Orange County.** **I have the utmost respect for our law enforcement community.** I have made it clear that, as Governor, I will do everything I can to support our law enforcement in California.
---
| | |
---
| | Gavin Newsom has continued to launch attacks on our brave and selfless police officers. He’s allowed crime to run rampant across the state. Newsom has only made it more difficult for Police in California to do their jobs, and easier for criminals to avoid consequences. _This cannot go on._**Californians fear for their safety under the failed leadership of Gavin Newsom.** It’s time to take back California. _Will you stand with me?_
---
| **STAND WITH ME: SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT**

Derek — we have three very important pieces of information to share with you.
1. CNN has again named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.

2. Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”

3. So now we need your help! Our goal in August is to get 50,000 donations to help fuel this campaign to keep Mark in the Senate.

And it’s going to be crucial we hit this goal, because with the Senate again up for grabs, this is already a multimillion-dollar race.

**We still have time left this month to dig deep and knock this goal out of the park. So with our deadline approaching, we have to ask:

[If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good VA? We can’t afford to fall short of our 50,000 contribution goal, not when we are being targeted by Trump, Mitch McConnell and their allies.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpFgGRpsN992ELtSvGuU7ulMLklcfy-X_L4AyhBjoi3VR7optvF0RySPxIglq4Rhe2bDgB3DFyu9748T2G5fO7GWD4aN_4YX6xUzuI4tm7auCFmkOvxJxryjxZJnuTp4r7hm4rE5qKkBkfK9-tDvu8bWtHXH3-v3OLStZTT87tsArYlvh8AElZvDFvegwCz0y9X9hoMDqInDwJRbscq6jScM2g5wtOcys1yjqndjniisXh7kNDypHgoRm5j-RVBULjUa1sIIQLB-PdUPnouAMm6QWfTf3sU82Y0iFdS-8VQ0IEPui0GpS9As_LArnBf6VZKBIUQj4R6sI6TSaYp0RB6H4moyPmJ6xfledereO1cn/3ev/cJyJjuRgTwCv9SJxtuJ8KQ/h1/htjZgd1V4VudtW8cOQsN8_MaB4xpEPhzQ4JzveRK__8)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpFgGRpsN992ELtSvGuU7ulMLklcfy-X_L4AyhBjoi3VPM3Lo3KKonmkl2gJqvW4WoJWU5eGYYfFmxGIJmpzNf13eArcMfBRjWMpqaOR8RH0RExJMIfI5Z7bzcV6MC6vdcAbXLUXn_xRY9MQqc8GTqiNjKJdGkIgQaQs7Vm7_fZofj3y7A5VEliKqTMS4WBmipjo2m-SSApXz28py_jLOuZyuWhrMuE7pyzu2jYi0v7TjK29yH_nMKh7Ar-A421FLzUyoY_sskMwR-XQExq2staBPOLxahpVK0E79hhVYX2guLE-fetu-WER1XZ6jkNoYu3I70QGytZLz_Df_crnFFHDN54ZJOomjCxz1lFpxWBE/3ev/cJyJjuRgTwCv9SJxtuJ8KQ/h2/8WaWkgWdHcfhhEqVcS9WZwz4NTtkzFPF6RrxmJlB9AU)

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: I Met With Our Officers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, Last Thursday, I met with our local law enforcement officials to discuss the crime wave that has devastated our communit
Peter,Last Thursday, I met with our local law enforcement officials to discuss the crime wave that has devastated our communities over the last few months and how we can stop it. **Our officers said they need more funding, better outreach, and higher recruitment. Part of the funding they requested will provide body cameras for the officers, who welcome the technology to help provide transparency and protection. **The radical left's push to defund the police is extremely dangerous. Our officers need more resources to help fight and prevent crime and they need our support. Unfortunately, the anti-police rhetoric of the left is destroying our communities. [**Please donate now to ensure our law enforcement agencies are funded, and our communities are safe. We cannot afford to let far-left policies threaten the safety of Wisconsin families.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fklddll-idtjvlhlh-r/) On Wisconsin,Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Donate Now](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fklddll-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fklddll-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fklddll-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fklddll-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fklddll-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Jim Jordan
subject: COVID Vaccine Mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209330:6jvU5N2Np:m:1:3253819041:D0A9BA5C88209A2FCCD487A566A0296B:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209330:6jvU5N2Np:m:1:3253819041:D0A9BA5C88209A2FCCD487A566A0296B:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209330:6jvU5N2Np:m:1:3253819041:D0A9BA5C88209A2FCCD487A566A0296B:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 28TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209330:6jvU5N2Np:m:1:3253819041:D0A9BA5C88209A2FCCD487A566A0296B:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209359:66p9ON2NV:m:1:3253819041:1F60DA8676B1395EE824F012B361FFA9:r) Peter, The Biden border crisis is worse than it has _**EVER**_ been. In June, 180,000 illegal immigrants crossed the U.S.-Mexico border. In July, U.S. Border Patrol reported nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossing into America -- the **HIGHEST** number in more than two decades. **And today America functionally has OPEN BORDERS thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and we 're on pace for 2 MILLION PEOPLE to cross illegally into our country.** [**Joe Biden and radical Democrats refuse to enforce the law -- and America is paying the price. We _must_ do everything in our power to ensure that we take control of the Senate next fall and send good Republicans to Washington to fight alongside me. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209359:66p9ON2NV:m:1:3253819041:1F60DA8676B1395EE824F012B361FFA9:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209359:66p9ON2NV:m:1:3253819041:1F60DA8676B1395EE824F012B361FFA9:r) **_Last year, thanks to President Trump and a responsible Republican Senate, we had the lowest rate of illegal immigration in 45 years._** But Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and radical Democrats in Congress have destroyed America's border and homeland security in just MONTHS. It's gotten so severe, the United States Supreme Court had to intervene by reversing Biden's decision to end the Trump-era "Remain in Mexico" policy. This international agreement, negotiated between President Trump with the government of Mexico, requires illegal immigrants who crossed the border to stay in Mexico while their asylum cases are adjudicated in the United States. [**We must end this Biden border crisis, which is why I 'm counting on your help to WIN the Republican majority in 2022 ... to RESTORE our border security ... and to END the Democrats' dangerous immigration policies. Will you make your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209359:66p9ON2NV:m:1:3253819041:1F60DA8676B1395EE824F012B361FFA9:r) As soon as they took power in D.C., Democrats immediately stopped construction on President Trump's border wall. They reinstated the failed policy of "catch and release" which sends illegal immigrants, many of whom are sick with COVID, into our communities. And they ended the incredibly successful "Remain in Mexico" international agreement, which meant people who entered Mexico illegally then crossed into the U.S. would stay in Mexico -- **NOT America** -- while their cases were pending. **_Unlike Joe Biden, I have been to the U.S.-Mexico border this year because I care about keeping America safe and keeping our border secure ... and I've seen the CRISIS that Democrats' damaging and cruel policies have created._** **_Peter_**[**, please help me TODAY with your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more as I fight to SECURE OUR BORDER and win back the Republican majority in the critical election next year.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209359:66p9ON2NV:m:1:3253819041:1F60DA8676B1395EE824F012B361FFA9:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209359:66p9ON2NV:m:1:3253819041:1F60DA8676B1395EE824F012B361FFA9:r) For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209637:JsgQNQ2Nh:m:1:3253819041:B13D43BFDCB7ED949EA922D251BB8072:r) Dear Peter,
I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course, **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,"** is available on DVD.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209637:JsgQNQ2Nh:m:1:3253819041:B13D43BFDCB7ED949EA922D251BB8072:r)In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education.
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you 'll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209637:JsgQNQ2Nh:m:1:3253819041:B13D43BFDCB7ED949EA922D251BB8072:r)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That's why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College's national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation's youth. Your gift will also help to:

* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as "Genesis."
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty.
* Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College's Barney Charter School Initiative.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale's educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives."**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray

Hillsdale College

clean_body: Dear Peter, I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College's popular online course, " The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on DVD. this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature. "The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text. The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education. Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation. These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph. This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs. For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you 'll receive the DVD as our thank you. To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That's why your support is so crucial. Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College's national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation's youth. Your gift will also help to: Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as "Genesis." Expand the readership of Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty. Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College's Barney Charter School Initiative. Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio. Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale's educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of " The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives." Dear Friend,

At Keystone Progress Education Fund, we’re doing everything we can to make sure your voting rights are protected and your ballot is counted.

We came close to losing our democracy in the aftermath of the 2020 election -- and we can’t let that happen again this time.

In order to fight efforts by legislators and others to undermine elections, we need to focus on our elections:

- Educating, empowering, and training voters to make sure their votes are protected
- Working to elect progressive judges
- Fighting conspiracy theories

We're doing this and more at KPEF, but we need your help to reach our end-of-month goal by August 31 at midnight.

Please donate today to help us protect our very essential American right to vote.

subject: Biden must resign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
25th Amendment? | Did you watch Joe Biden's address to the Nation about his failure in Afghanistan? So many things were just...wrong.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209731:JTZPsQ2xN:m:1:3253819041:C5AA42BB9C6F2D701DB84FC285C37761:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209731:JTZPsQ2xN:m:1:3253819041:C5AA42BB9C6F2D701DB84FC285C37761:r)

Peter,

Did you watch Joe Biden's address to the Nation about his failure in Afghanistan? So many things were just...wrong.

Biden blames everyone else but himself - including my father who did nothing wrong. I'd say it's **unbelievable ...** _but it 's actually not at all unbelievable, unfortunately._

If the first 7 months have been THIS BAD, imagine what Biden can do with the remaining 3.5 years of his presidency. **It 's time for Joe Biden to resign. If this disaster occured under my father, every Democrat and fake news reporter in the country would be calling for the 25th Amendment.

Maybe it should be used on Joe?

One thing is for certain though, he is not fit to be OUR President, and something must be done. **

_You can INCREASE your impact by 300% when you step up NOW._

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to DEMAND Joe Biden resign IMMEDIATELY and your gift will be increased by 300%.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209731:JTZPsQ2xN:m:1:3253819041:C5AA42BB9C6F2D701DB84FC285C37761:r)**

Joe Biden didn't take any questions at his press conference because he's not capable of it. If you watched him struggle through the speech, you could see it in his eyes: there's nothing behind them, no one is home, and it's likely that he took days off just to be able to muster the energy to get through that BS.

I'm going to call my father with the list of patriots who called for Biden's resignation - can I tell him you stepped up?

Peter,

Joe Biden has failed on so many accounts - where do we even begin?

He gave our enemies all around the World a great and lasting victory when he unexpectedly and inexplicably _removed our great soldiers from Afghanistan_ before taking out our U.S. citizens and allies.

Leaving our Military till the end was such a simple decision that anyone with intelligence and common sense would have made, but he called it wrong and instantly created perhaps the **greatest embarrassment for our Country in its history** \- and it is far from over.

subject: I noticed you haven’t chipped in to support our campaign yet

body:
Peter --

I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution to my U.S. Senate campaign today. This is an important moment for our team in Wisconsin, and we need your help. Here’s the situation:

Ron Johnson has started attacking me directly because I believe our U.S. Senator shouldn’t be peddling dangerous conspiracy theories or writing laws to enrich himself. Instead, he should be working on the issues that matter most to Wisconsin workers and families. But Ron Johnson isn't fighting to improve lives. The guy is only focused on spreading lies.

Now, here’s the hard truth: Our campaign is being watched very closely by Ron Johnson’s allies back in Washington because he’s in trouble. It’s no coincidence that he started attacking me after a major election forecaster upgraded this race to a toss-up. Ron Johnson will likely continue coming after me, but even if he doesn’t, his GOP allies will raise huge sums of money for his campaign and spend it on attack ads.

Peter, I’m reaching out to you because I noticed you haven’t chipped in to support our campaign yet -- and that’s okay! If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, I hope you’ll consider adding a donation now. Each contribution -- no matter how large or small -- allows us to raise the funds we need to prepare for whatever the Republicans throw at us next.

**Will you add your first donation to our campaign before our fundraising deadline expires on August 31? This race is one of only two toss-ups and is said to be the best shot Democrats have at flipping a GOP Senate seat to expand our majority. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210369:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210369:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r) Peter, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I'm proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards ' decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by August 31. Will you help me protect students as they begin a new school year -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210369:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210369:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children's minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America's powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you'll see the horrors of what K-12 "learning" has become in modern America. As socialism and "woke" culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as "diversity training"** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their "racist" namesakes**, which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That 's why TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But Peter, I need your support to do it.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210369:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation's **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts' acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation's largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We've published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210370:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r)** ... and we're using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I 'm asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by August 31.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210369:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210369:6s_aAQ23N:m:1:3253819041:A0F71988F0A9FB3147833A3E9C535E26:r) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it's too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](${Gears.unsubscribe\(\)})

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34863867/303289981/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk189-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmMzZmNlMi1lMjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iMZY7VnvVl2OpH5q0j6wU8wsaB7Fqq_18YdzSXiAF_E=)

I'll lay this out as clearly as I can, friend: My number-one goal is to defeat GOP extremists in Arizona and finally flip our governorship blue – but we can't do that without reaching every goal between now and our election. **[Our next major goal is at midnight on Tuesday, and we won't hit it without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34863868/303289982/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk189-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmMzZmNlMi1lMjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iMZY7VnvVl2OpH5q0j6wU8wsaB7Fqq_18YdzSXiAF_E=)** **So here are the facts – and what I need you to help me do about them.**
**What we're up against:** Arizona's GOP has totally given up on governing, instead focusing all their energy on spreading lies and conspiracies about the 2020 election. They've pushed a sham "election audit," brought in extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump to add fuel to the fire and are gearing up to spend _millions_ of dollars to keep Arizona red.
**What it's led to:** Now, an expert at The Washington Post has made clear that the best way for voters to fight back is by electing a Democratic governor. Meanwhile, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says this race is a "toss-up," meaning we can win! **But our finance team says it'll take another $9,133 by midnight tonight to stay on track. **
**What YOU can do:** Grassroots supporters like you delivered the White House for Joe Biden and the Senate for Democrats – including a win right here in Arizona. With so much at stake in this race, we need to bring that same energy and dedication _again_ , rallying together to build an unbeatable movement that restores Arizona's potential and flips it blue!
**[So here's what I need from you, friend: Before our major end-of-month deadline, can you chip in $5, $25 – whatever you can – to fight back against GOP extremists and win this race? If everyone reading this made a donation, I know we could hit our goal before our midnight deadline – and together, finally defeat GOP extremism in Arizona. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: An important goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Reaching out to see if you’re able to make a contribution
#

Hey folks,
I set an important fundraising goal that our team needs to hit before our August fundraising deadline on Tuesday night.
It's really important that we hit this goal — especially since we're more than halfway through 2021, and 2022 will be here before we know it. So I'm reaching out to see if you’re able to make a contribution.
We can’t have a government that works for working people if we don’t put an end to the GOP’s obstruction tactics.
So Pennsylvania can't afford another Senator like Joe Manchin, who consistently plays right into Republicans' hands and stands in the way of our progress.
Our next Senator must be someone who will act boldly to save our sacred democracy and deliver real progress for Pennsylvania’s working families.
If I’m elected, I’ll fight tooth and nail for working folks like you and me — I won’t make weak excuses.
**But I need your help to get there. Our deadline is at midnight on Tuesday, and we need a strong showing of grassroots support to hit our goal and make big investments to win this race.**
[So please, friend, could you chip in $3 right now to fuel our fight for working people? Anything you can contribute makes a big difference, especially this month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34864416/303292604/-353695395?refcode2=b34e6187-e408-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210829-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzRlNjE4Ny1lNDA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3E1ZclHm9AaCO-DaqB9p2VrJJ9qfy2I7NO5qGcBFKEY=)

Thanks so much,
Malcolm

body:
Will you join me? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDEiVylnc0F6J3xROe3_7OOnBddowkEZtutXD9o6GBkXIXP6jzcL3LJ_CIxDnLdGoh-6VRwgXAMRX1c5eKxGHX_vw90yBjMwqcZYVAdq9ryV6pJMgt_mg5hzFS_yMeoNsJ9G_YROrW1qlAJ80dnoHnNl_MuCdFAUPiM_qEqpfhTPT78xI7i-PsIZWwzW0mASCqjkhvxxZdnCKHRcgYYn7f-E-i7THNBItmmY-LykLvxLjpt3SG5kqQWFsqd-Zf4kZK0gAHC5K_rNsu_0wxPzrlefApRu4XBbARriel9QaiA7MBbBh0rUvhri-870eiQi9brtWEjYycUVVC3sPEl6ARLDPwhISvlCjaN3mRkqnkOUq/3ev/85lvJUbsSYy7WN5tvDXcDg/h0/1_fsZYN5IpAg3Y2_HEabPcwmONDeXPnAuaYwGZ6XyUE)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDEiVylnc0F6J3xROe3_7OOkuJgmnjIcs9_61gSu8K-xPFxrGR1TS3WEx-YtFlTpjNm3zvaDORubg4tngAR2HuHTbslPUrTisbTyZIRQnsnF2c4nbWKyTYfH-wrHxM03oAByivVBF-WS9bfuprPce_Hsh1U5dxPolpDaHXrqp5NjUV9DqsCQVdqVxhJVpizvMuIKNBhBCRwW_XtIx84XhmZZo2HFEpzPPLkhAjh1Ef3-E2aNGpCE87owanrIFQKsqitudxwm1hZ1KVXRglklfGZlFMhsxTgTKClW9buoRx7zZjQ1cXN8ezouP19TChmfwg2nO5Z9ZE-mYlBZud8gh1DkY4MetRpm_VgD1oZmlHUXA/3ev/85lvJUbsSYy7WN5tvDXcDg/h1/Q0wa3n5DUmKvVs4BdlB3bFMEwXQe6upZol3G_sZo7po)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDJt0qwMPy5v36a6OPf7E0YbNQ9ZOVLCQPKFjQocH88yyRmosppP4sMYMRLc6U-YOefN73aJaD_vBfvSrvQbHBCpC7qcEeNJUkC69ICpsbrb6aBSTb6Akjdrhxpym_Y1PtN0w5sfrmuQWRWpr3Q21Q_nvqBeU7pWdJhmjgAV-oART5mdhC3XRBfCQ_UdwQlVPR4gvdVa530Lb1tcD7W2DfD2c_d8HV8As8yrU0pp3OsJ_WFtPt9eKtj9pTUhradYsgbBVxgAf_LvaxRuxDhGJWUU3kBkGzNzYDk-0LUsMGThCL-KuxFwR3loAyl0eW7vjkZSqlx4PPYX71SbVO1jgr37TBpBAPz8DqhP7vrVzmydSHT9iOeofcfYawDT4RQ5tbw/3ev/85lvJUbsSYy7WN5tvDXcDg/h2/Tl39akpmykpZ3Q-d4hbWzJmNmFmtBCmYADFbk2o4JAY)

clean_body: Will you join me? | | | My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

Senator Warner has indicated that he will vote in favor of it **_if _**it comes to that. However, our ask remains the same: [Senator Warner, SIGN the PRO Act. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnliSBA_KTxV3pOSqwl2LBRYjbcYlvt7ulPC8so22QZ8cqXB5Tpix-_Rs1vfla4BB5tvhJGFiuPE9hUTCd1i9MonWNMQN9xHviaHPTTglC4EeDNt95AZSEc1MqqnYB51IVlzZfYctCzf2q2szdPBmnTYHjEkViYck3xEq6f70i5mlDDPFnWCt1VGeYAg7TyZqy3aBvjS9EyFDoSBqM_xMdo3AqLIEKUeHIfK96YoVNPNzA/3ev/DW5_-XrbR_qnE66y9Zq2BQ/h2/pJg_Z8HySrPpPZKRvYiw0UnwHNT37j8ocYIkVlacdQw) Voting is great and we appreciate the support. But actions speak louder than words and signatures are more powerful than promises. New polling states that 65% of Virginia voters support the PRO Act and yet our Senator Mark Warner is one of 3 Democratic Senators NOT supporting the PRO Act. He is the ONLY Federal Elected Official from Virginia not voting for the PRO act as well. [It is incredibly important for Virginians to reach out to his office and tell him that he needs to support this bill.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnliSBA_KTxV3pOSqwl2LBRYjbcYlvt7ulPC8so22QZ8cqXB5Tpix-_Rs1vfla4BB5tHonx4-iE4JnqQ78UD5mNSnMyd3VehVwp7SJzsnonQaZGQKbqKy8Z2oEn1vqneir3HZSD9-FohYFzp_QXZBut9cbdZXYRKwrierioiaUfqiFSB31rlLkWGon7m-DFC6U-BCj3v0xXucCH2yRS5TY_hnaFFrtLgEhc_Cia-6Z6vbA/3ev/DW5_-XrbR_qnE66y9Zq2BQ/h3/nhlX6r7UlXYS2Vr38WTisaOFjJmu7vR7-Ey1zCA99cs) If you don't live in Virginia, ask your Senators to lobby Senators Warner, Kelly, and Sinema for their signatures. The U.S. House of Representatives passed the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act last year, but anti-worker legislators in the Senate blocked it. Undeterred, working people fought to elect pro-worker lawmakers to the Senate, House and White House. And we won. **[Send Your Letter Today](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnliSBA_KTxV3pOSqwl2LBRYjbcYlvt7ulPC8so22QZ8cqXB5Tpix-_Rs1vfla4BB5uQmY_jM-uLVtibZqToHx_sKAShEqYMcgNLApxqqXgsFQjFp3yAWrsejf_W_daOLdekWymuGR0bHRUNOKIqC2Ymjv3P_ytdmWy80FoopmRH7DiQJU1_ASFqeYtZYl01qOVAQ-44RvoOfL9fJolDC0--s8_JzUmn7Ry6F5Wb_U-q7Q/3ev/DW5_-XrbR_qnE66y9Zq2BQ/h4/rW2_XyLzPXsXu5-mBcNa7t1YHiuqgjvLgq6i_Xtfwmk)** Stronger unions mean higher wages, safer working conditions and dignity for all people who work. The PRO Act is our first step to get there. [Use the form and we'll connect you to Mark Warner's office. Tell him to sign the PRO the Act. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnliSBA_KTxV3pOSqwl2LBRYjbcYlvt7ulPC8so22QZ8cqXB5Tpix-_Rs1vfla4BB5vJ42KFVmHz-wdnh765LHM6-clsHWnQ-jQV2qfYDH5FDIZVFAxnKew8HBat3HPERhgUt1BtzDvZjXgEatiS_5nOz3JlLCPLsjgOU2DE4Ac0CpycZ6Hl_cfQPkBBIgB7FcbrjnCYcRH3Gd1eotQUQ48bHqLq4051xtwqhb-JrLsffw/3ev/DW5_-XrbR_qnE66y9Zq2BQ/h5/ZcXKoD0Lm9JQ1e0Ko2JNo9kRcTbzyiwC0fQEcZ_FQf0) In Solidarity, KTBBH Team

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I'm running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
Can you add your name to personally endorse our campaign? It's very important that we have a strong showing of support.
#
Friends -
Last month, I announced that I am running for the United States Senate in Wisconsin.
This is going to be a grassroots campaign built by people from all walks of life. So I’d like to ask you to do something important to show you're a part of this team:
[**Please add your name to say that you personally endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate. Your endorsement will send a powerful message about the coalition we're building together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34866867/303301282/-2111078509?refcode2=a59c3eae-eb08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210829-2-tns-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTljM2VhZS1lYjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Un4B6fl7MMtyAKY6mkJ-TphCbzdkvDZLoNODWm5A6es=&emci=5b1c66ed-5c07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a59c3eae-eb08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16470383)
The current system isn't working for the people of Wisconsin. Hard work just isn't paying off like it used to. People just like you and me work longer and longer for less and less while big corporations and CEOs bring in larger profits than ever before.
Instead of changing our dreams...we need to change the game. It's time to stand _for_ something. For opportunity. For everyone.
We can't settle for what is – we have to reach for what can be. We cannot lower our expectations when things get tough.
This will not be an easy campaign. The only way we will win this race and expand opportunity for everyone is if we do it together.
I was first elected as a State Representative at age 25, and then I became our state's first Black Lieutenant Governor at 32. During my time in office, I've been committed to creating a Wisconsin where everyone has the chance to thrive – regardless of which ZIP code they live in.
My mom was a Milwaukee public school teacher for 30 years, and my dad worked 3rd shift at the General Motors plant. When I was growing up, they were both active union members organizing for better wages and defending workers' rights. Their example showed me the importance of working hard and fighting for opportunity for everyone.
Wisconsin is my home, and I believe it is a great place with a bright future.
As the birthplace of the Labor Movement and the Progressive Movement, Wisconsin has a lot to be proud of. But many communities – especially Black, Brown, and Indigenous – have also borne the brunt of systemic racism and the many crises we've endured. The truth is that we’ve got a lot of work to do to build a more just and equitable state for every Wisconsinite.
We all know the realities of a broken health care system, income inequality and the climate crisis. But that also means that we'll be taking on some very powerful special interests who will try to stop our campaign.
I have full confidence that if we're in this together, we are going to do great things for Wisconsin and the country. That's why I'm asking you directly:
[**Can you add your name to personally endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate? It's very important that we have a strong showing of support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34866869/303301283/-2111078509?refcode2=a59c3eae-eb08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210829-2-tns-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTljM2VhZS1lYjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Un4B6fl7MMtyAKY6mkJ-TphCbzdkvDZLoNODWm5A6es=&emci=5b1c66ed-5c07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a59c3eae-eb08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16470383)
Let's work together to change the game and create a Wisconsin that works for all of us.
Thank you for adding your name to join this campaign.
All my best,
Mandela Barnes

clean_body: Can you add your name to personally endorse our campaign? It's very important that we have a strong showing of support. Friends - Last month, I announced that I am running for the United States Senate in Wisconsin. This is going to be a grassroots campaign built by people from all walks of life. So I’d like to ask you to do something important to show you're a part of this team: The current system isn't working for the people of Wisconsin. Hard work just isn't paying off like it used to. People just like you and me work longer and longer for less and less while big corporations and CEOs bring in larger profits than ever before. Instead of changing our dreams...we need to change the game. It's time to stand for something. For opportunity. For everyone. We can't settle for what is – we have to reach for what can be. We cannot lower our expectations when things get tough. This will not be an easy campaign. The only way we will win this race and expand opportunity for everyone is if we do it together. I was first elected as a State Representative at age 25, and then I became our state's first Black Lieutenant Governor at 32. During my time in office, I've been committed to creating a Wisconsin where everyone has the chance to thrive – regardless of which ZIP code they live in. My mom was a Milwaukee public school teacher for 30 years, and my dad worked 3rd shift at the General Motors plant. When I was growing up, they were both active union members organizing for better wages and defending workers' rights. Their example showed me the importance of working hard and fighting for opportunity for everyone. Wisconsin is my home, and I believe it is a great place with a bright future. As the birthplace of the Labor Movement and the Progressive Movement, Wisconsin has a lot to be proud of. But many communities – especially Black, Brown, and Indigenous – have also borne the brunt of systemic racism and the many crises we've endured. The truth is that we’ve got a lot of work to do to build a more just and equitable state for every Wisconsinite. We all know the realities of a broken health care system, income inequality and the climate crisis. But that also means that we'll be taking on some very powerful special interests who will try to stop our campaign. I have full confidence that if we're in this together, we are going to do great things for Wisconsin and the country. That's why I'm asking you directly: Let's work together to change the game and create a Wisconsin that works for all of us. Thank you for adding your name to join this campaign. All my best, Mandela Barnes * Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin P.O. Box 597 Milwaukee, WI 53201 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for your commitment to reclaiming Wisconsin. Emails are an important way for Mandela to communicate with his supporters, but if you no longer wish to receive email updates, you can .

Now more than ever, Texans are ready for meaningful change, and we are determined to bring bold leadership that will solve problems and address these challenges head-on. So we’re laying the groundwork to take on Dan Patrick by centering everyday Texans — not wealthy donors and corporate lobbyists. And we’re counting on folks like you to help us do it: **Can we count on you to donate $1, $3, or any amount you can spare to help us reach our August fundraising goal? clean_body: | Hey there: Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming in a couple days and before we ask you to chip in toward our goal, we wanted to explain why your support matters so much right now. As our state struggles to get coronavirus cases under control, Texas Republicans continue to push the same anti-science, anti-democratic policies that led us to the crises we’re in now. Now more than ever, Texans are ready for meaningful change, and we are determined to bring bold leadership that will solve problems and address these challenges head-on. So we’re laying the groundwork to take on Dan Patrick by centering everyday Texans — not wealthy donors and corporate lobbyists. And we’re counting on folks like you to help us do it: Can we count on you to donate $1, $3, or any amount you can spare to help us reach our August fundraising goal? It’s going to take a strong grassroots movement to flip Texas blue: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for anything you can give. We appreciate all your support to move our great state forward. Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

| | [**_I know it’s a Sunday. But I promised my husband, Tony, that I’d lend him a hand today. I’m about to explain why flipping this seat is so important and why I’m confident Tony can pull this off. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $15 now to support him? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34867748/303304258/1129282168?refcode=20210829_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTZkZDdjMy1lZTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYDHbOHJ6-ApGsx20od242w3mOdTKlLFJqVf0gLk25g=)

Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night.

— Knocking on doors to meet voters
— Connecting with local businesses and community organizations
— Raising money to keep his campaign running
— _On top of helping me raise our two young kids!_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34867749/303304259/1129282168?refcode=20210829_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTZkZDdjMy1lZTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYDHbOHJ6-ApGsx20od242w3mOdTKlLFJqVf0gLk25g=) That's just how Tony is.

[**_When Tony believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. And right now, I know in my heart that our neighbors need a fighter like Tony in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34867750/303304261/1129282168?refcode=20210829_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTZkZDdjMy1lZTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYDHbOHJ6-ApGsx20od242w3mOdTKlLFJqVf0gLk25g=)

Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families.

Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school.

Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can.

That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman.

Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations.

After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, [**_I knew that Tony was the right person to replace him._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34867751/303304262/1129282168?refcode=20210829_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTZkZDdjMy1lZTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYDHbOHJ6-ApGsx20od242w3mOdTKlLFJqVf0gLk25g=)

[**_Tony has shown us he is the leader that our community and our families need and deserve. But Don Bacon already has over $420,000 lined up to stop Tony from winning. I know if anyone can catch up and flip this seat, it’s Tony -- but only if he can hit his $12,800 goal before his End-of-Month deadline. I’m personally asking: will you chip in $15 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34867753/303304263/1129282168?refcode=20210829_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTZkZDdjMy1lZTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYDHbOHJ6-ApGsx20od242w3mOdTKlLFJqVf0gLk25g=)

I know you work hard for your money and I wish I didn’t have to ask.

But if Tony misses his $12,800 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign that will hurt his chances of winning. [**So I’m asking one last time: If you believe in Tony as much as I do, will you chip in $15 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34867754/303304264/1129282168?refcode=20210829_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTZkZDdjMy1lZTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYDHbOHJ6-ApGsx20od242w3mOdTKlLFJqVf0gLk25g=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34867755/303304265/1129282168?refcode=20210829_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTZkZDdjMy1lZTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wYDHbOHJ6-ApGsx20od242w3mOdTKlLFJqVf0gLk25g=)

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. clean_body: | | | = Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night. — Knocking on doors to meet voters — Connecting with local businesses and community organizations — Raising money to keep his campaign running — On top of helping me raise our two young kids! = That's just how Tony is. = Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service. I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families. Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school. Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can. That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman. Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations. After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, = = I know you work hard for your money and I wish I didn’t have to ask. But if Tony misses his $12,800 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign that will hurt his chances of winning. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for supporting my husband, Lauren (and Ava and Luca!) | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. name: Team Mondaire
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

We have both good and bad news.
**Here’s the bad news:** we don’t yet know what Mondaire’s district is going to look like after redistricting according to the 2020 Census. That means the new parameters could be favorable to a primary challenger, a Republican opponent, or both.
**But here’s the good news:** Mondaire has been the underdog before — but he came out on top in the crowded 2020 primary because of supporters like you. If we’re able to mobilize the same level of support that we did in our first campaign, Mondaire _will_ win re-election.
**So, here’s what you can do:** Making a contribution, of $3 or whatever you can afford, will go a long way towards helping us win re-election.
The dollar amount is less important than the donation itself, so we’ve set a goal of 500 donations before August 31st.
**[So, what do you say? Can you make a contribution to Mondaire’s re-election campaign today? If you’re able, you can click here to do so.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34868008/303304819/-376196102?refcode2=cde3406a-ef08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210829-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGUzNDA2YS1lZjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwynoQVn5Hm8VAAhp4FlPemchniHtSn66MlBuCDXbUk=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34868009/303304820/-376196102?refcode2=cde3406a-ef08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210829-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGUzNDA2YS1lZjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwynoQVn5Hm8VAAhp4FlPemchniHtSn66MlBuCDXbUk=)**
Thank you, as always, for your support. We’ll be back in touch with more updates when we have them.

clean_body: We have both good and bad news. Here’s the bad news: we don’t yet know what Mondaire’s district is going to look like after redistricting according to the 2020 Census. That means the new parameters could be favorable to a primary challenger, a Republican opponent, or both. But here’s the good news: Mondaire has been the underdog before — but he came out on top in the crowded 2020 primary because of supporters like you. If we’re able to mobilize the same level of support that we did in our first campaign, Mondaire will win re-election. So, here’s what you can do: Making a contribution, of $3 or whatever you can afford, will go a long way towards helping us win re-election. The dollar amount is less important than the donation itself, so we’ve set a goal of 500 donations before August 31st. = = Thank you, as always, for your support. We’ll be back in touch with more updates when we have them. \- Team Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Ted Cruz
subject: Crisis on the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209395:6hgaCQ2NS:m:1:3253819041:848AC3A6CF1C169C071DAD7C8E14296C:r) Peter, The Biden border crisis is worse than it has _**EVER**_ been. In June, 180,000 illegal immigrants crossed the U.S.-Mexico border. In July, U.S. Border Patrol reported nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossing into America -- the **HIGHEST** number in more than two decades. **And today America functionally has OPEN BORDERS thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and we 're on pace for 2 MILLION PEOPLE to cross illegally into our country.** [**Joe Biden and radical Democrats refuse to enforce the law -- and America is paying the price. We _must_ do everything in our power to ensure that we take control of the Senate next fall and send good Republicans to Washington to fight alongside me. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209395:6hgaCQ2NS:m:1:3253819041:848AC3A6CF1C169C071DAD7C8E14296C:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209395:6hgaCQ2NS:m:1:3253819041:848AC3A6CF1C169C071DAD7C8E14296C:r) **_Last year, thanks to President Trump and a responsible Republican Senate, we had the lowest rate of illegal immigration in 45 years._** But Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and radical Democrats in Congress have destroyed America's border and homeland security in just MONTHS. It's gotten so severe, the United States Supreme Court had to intervene by reversing Biden's decision to end the Trump-era "Remain in Mexico" policy. This international agreement, negotiated between President Trump with the government of Mexico, requires illegal immigrants who crossed the border to stay in Mexico while their asylum cases are adjudicated in the United States. [**We must end this Biden border crisis, which is why I 'm counting on your help to WIN the Republican majority in 2022 ... to RESTORE our border security ... and to END the Democrats' dangerous immigration policies. Will you make your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209395:6hgaCQ2NS:m:1:3253819041:848AC3A6CF1C169C071DAD7C8E14296C:r) As soon as they took power in D.C., Democrats immediately stopped construction on President Trump's border wall. They reinstated the failed policy of "catch and release" which sends illegal immigrants, many of whom are sick with COVID, into our communities. And they ended the incredibly successful "Remain in Mexico" international agreement, which meant people who entered Mexico illegally then crossed into the U.S. would stay in Mexico -- **NOT America** -- while their cases were pending. **_Unlike Joe Biden, I have been to the U.S.-Mexico border this year because I care about keeping America safe and keeping our border secure ... and I've seen the CRISIS that Democrats' damaging and cruel policies have created._** **_Peter_**[**, please help me TODAY with your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more as I fight to SECURE OUR BORDER and win back the Republican majority in the critical election next year.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209395:6hgaCQ2NS:m:1:3253819041:848AC3A6CF1C169C071DAD7C8E14296C:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209395:6hgaCQ2NS:m:1:3253819041:848AC3A6CF1C169C071DAD7C8E14296C:r) For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

clean_body: Peter, The Biden border crisis is worse than it has EVER been. In June, 180,000 illegal immigrants crossed the U.S.-Mexico border. In July, U.S. Border Patrol reported nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossing into America -- the HIGHEST number in more than two decades. And today America functionally has OPEN BORDERS thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and we 're on pace for 2 MILLION PEOPLE to cross illegally into our country. Last year, thanks to President Trump and a responsible Republican Senate, we had the lowest rate of illegal immigration in 45 years. But Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and radical Democrats in Congress have destroyed America's border and homeland security in just MONTHS. It's gotten so severe, the United States Supreme Court had to intervene by reversing Biden's decision to end the Trump-era "Remain in Mexico" policy. This international agreement, negotiated between President Trump with the government of Mexico, requires illegal immigrants who crossed the border to stay in Mexico while their asylum cases are adjudicated in the United States. As soon as they took power in D.C., Democrats immediately stopped construction on President Trump's border wall. They reinstated the failed policy of "catch and release" which sends illegal immigrants, many of whom are sick with COVID, into our communities. And they ended the incredibly successful "Remain in Mexico" international agreement, which meant people who entered Mexico illegally then crossed into the U.S. would stay in Mexico -- NOT America -- while their cases were pending. Unlike Joe Biden, I have been to the U.S.-Mexico border this year because I care about keeping America safe and keeping our border secure ... and I've seen the CRISIS that Democrats' damaging and cruel policies have created. clean_body: Virginia needs your help. | Friend, Today is the start of our August End-of-Month Fundraising Goal. Each month my team sets an End-of-Month goal for us to accomplish. Because of how strong your support was this August, my team has set our LARGEST ever! And when they let me know we had to raise $16,000 for our August End-of-Month goal over the next THREE DAYS, I told them not to worry, because I have the best supporters on my team, like you, Friend. Please contribute $10, $20, $50 or even $100 towards our August End-of-Month goal and I’ll be sure to send you a personalized thank you message. Peter,

I know you are probably spending your Sunday with your families, at church or having a summer afternoon barbecue, so I won’t take up too much of your time!

[**Today, I am asking every grassroots conservative across the nation to give me their Sunday-best by pitching in $15 or more to help me reach my critical August fundraising goal before the deadline in just 2 days!**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=89174c61c424410cb0e3d966d41387dc&_e=MPrm4fZBjJB2UohyNwiiiati_ysZJH9apHWT8gOZlg9L_cQrTc7-c9Y0UpUlphK1jOXuma0OTKcwJnKYDJIleyI-jOo6zN3mCp_kXiKsCo5ONUc3VOaEfhLBjEYExKckygAw_YXJZX1WEEtuHyR85KhtV9FghUM5GqyPQoAvceZ0IEar6UGqYJlXKI426VNWz-9QkPdizzN2a7o4PWr5qB94NBgzwu_HYoUWhN43pgCnZiT5VR9gDpppWHZrnsUymjWHEiLG7S-gCRqAWEAR7GNsqY3iEbXdaPyVM30nCbSZ65Xso2V3Dlb0i1BJEZD4Uuoys8LvltD7MeEqI3CqAHIcQAsPPViF2Jox3qDW9fEJwnhxRN9EXra1QtBW4HhF87d7Zdgs3CAIY2IXsl8jlWWmBw-l_dvmvySxV9IWyDuwJWUpOjzc7lgGWaJFCuvKErcSz2aiGWPcoIP-EOwmPw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=89174c61c424410cb0e3d966d41387dc&_e=MPrm4fZBjJB2UohyNwiiiati_ysZJH9apHWT8gOZlg9L_cQrTc7-c9Y0UpUlphK1jOXuma0OTKcwJnKYDJIleyI-jOo6zN3mCp_kXiKsCo5ONUc3VOaEfhLBjEYExKckygAw_YXJZX1WEEtuHyR85KhtV9FghUM5GqyPQoAvceZ0IEar6UGqYJlXKI426VNWz-9QkPdizzN2a7o4PWr5qB94NBgzwu_HYoUWhN43pgAB_4ej4_oo6TaVZJ1GlPhF2rkNHtScZAWo6QJHlFFcpa6IH0kG-WxB72siKonGWZrSzhbUCH46qy2RikeW6GltRHvmQ5dGjiH5gutb35Ff-QfL_SYi2x6JmCHFd3JrjWjySBC2M4pZTdnNaq50y2iaSn0yApkw2S-C5gqVb9M0Q6ZieHKGoRV-bp4d_ePEFWpcBjrOIwgdB8j4CIZakUZhnS_WHqQpDEtKfAFPy6Y62w%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m looking forward to bringing the compassion I exercised as a nurse to represent the people of Arizona. | I am proud to be a registered nurse. When I was working as a nurse, I had to care for people while advocating for their needs to make sure they were safe and taken care of — and that’s exactly what I plan to do for the people of AZ-04. = | = After seeing healthcare costs tear families apart and even seeing patients die after not being able to afford cancer treatment, I believe healthcare is a right, not a privilege. Paul Gosar has also worked as a healthcare professional, but he seemed to learn a different skill set: how to exploit and profit from people when they are struggling. I’m looking forward to bringing the compassion I exercised as a nurse to represent the people of Arizona, and I’m hoping you can help me get there. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Delina DiSanto * | | = Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress PO Box 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

**This month completely flew by, and our end-of-month deadline is on Tuesday -- which means we have only 2 days left to raise $5,400 for our digital fundraising goal.**

But as young progressive women in 2021, we know that if we want to see meaningful social change, we have to step up and take bold action.

Barrier To Entry PAC is all about empowering the working class, holding our government accountable to serving ALL people, and ensuring that Democratic political campaigns reflect those same inclusive values.

**That’s why when we say that this is a people-powered movement, we mean it. And we simply can’t succeed without the support of everyday, grassroots folks like you.**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am writing to ask if you can please make a $3 contribution to Mark's campaign for US Senate before our critical end of month fundraising deadline comes to an end?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
In life, we all deal with setbacks -- some minor, and some that can seem almost impossible to bear.
#

Friends —
In life, we all deal with setbacks -- some minor, and some that can seem almost impossible to bear.
But what I have learned throughout my recovery is that it’s not the setback that defines us, but how we respond.
I know it can feel frustrating to do so much to help elect Mark and then to wake up and find out some new outside group is attacking him with yet another multi-million dollar ad campaign.
But we all knew from the start that this was never going to be easy. The nature of running in such a competitive race and for such an important seat requires us to resist complacency and recommit ourselves to keep moving forward.
And that is why, with Mark's critical end of month fundraising deadline just days away, I am once again asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark’s re-election campaign before his end of month fundraising deadline comes to a close? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210829-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1220_6688874_QCddim&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210829-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1220_6688874_QCddim&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210829-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1220_6688874_QCddim&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210829-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1220_6688874_QCddim&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210829-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1220_6688874_QCddim&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210829-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1220_6688874_QCddim&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210829-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1220_6688874_QCddim&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim)**
---
****
Taking on so many Washington special interests isn't easy. It takes courage. But supporters like you have given Mark and I the strength to move forward every step of the way.
Courage,
Gabby

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=1220%2E6688874%2EQCddim).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Would you support a COVID vaccine mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209602:J3NUbQ2IN:m:1:3253819041:E168732BA53309BE400FFB333F7E5606:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209602:J3NUbQ2IN:m:1:3253819041:E168732BA53309BE400FFB333F7E5606:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209602:J3NUbQ2IN:m:1:3253819041:E168732BA53309BE400FFB333F7E5606:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 28TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209602:J3NUbQ2IN:m:1:3253819041:E168732BA53309BE400FFB333F7E5606:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209602:J3NUbQ2IN:m:1:3253819041:E168732BA53309BE400FFB333F7E5606:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209602:J3NUbQ2IN:m:1:3253819041:E168732BA53309BE400FFB333F7E5606:r)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58209602:J3NUbQ2IN:m:1:3253819041:E168732BA53309BE400FFB333F7E5606:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

| | Peter, I’m not your typical candidate in Western NC, including being a working mom of three. That means our campaign has to throw out the old playbook and run some new plays. Things like knocking doors this early to connect directly with voters. A recent morning started with my wife out of town, our two-year-old twins hurling raw eggs all over the living room floor and our childcare provider canceling -- the kind of morning where you either start to laugh or cry and then lean into the juggling act that is familiar to so many. When my son, Wyatt, ran over to help clean up the eggs with a look of sweet, focused determination, it reminded me to take a deep breath and roll with the chaos. “We’re in it,” is the phrase my wife, Meg, uses for moments like this. I think we need more people in Congress who live in the day-to-day realities of being a working parent and will fight for the kinds of policies that help working families. But right now this also means I need to use a wide range of strategies to raise the funds required to win this campaign. The old playbook -- spending 8 hours a day dialing for dollars all day -- is just not a fit. That’s where you come in and why your support has been such a difference maker already. Summer is a notoriously tough time to raise money. And now that August is almost over, I’m pushing hard to meet my fundraising goal. **[So I’m counting on supporters like you to continue to chip in to our grassroots campaign. Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: a sweet deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ll send you our best-selling, minimalist sticker for FREE as a way to show thanks and solidarity.
#
Peter,
Will you chip in a few bucks to the Flip Pennsylvania Fund to elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate and flip Pennsylvania blue?
**Okay... we'll sweeten the deal: Will you do it for a FREE union-made sticker sent straight to your door?**
**[Claim My Sticker](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28812?refcode=em20210829-2442&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2442%2E434096%2ERW8YB_)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28812?refcode=em20210829-2442&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2442%2E434096%2ERW8YB_)
Peter, donate *any* amount to our official Flip Pennsylvania Fund before Tuesday's big August 31 fundraising deadline, and we’ll send you our best-selling, minimalist sticker for FREE as a way to show thanks and solidarity.
[**_Most people are chipping in $10, but we’ll gratefully accept whatever works for your budget right now._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28812?refcode=em20210829-2442&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2442%2E434096%2ERW8YB_)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28812?refcode=em20210829-2442&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2442%2E434096%2ERW8YB_)
**[Claim My Sticker](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28812?refcode=em20210829-2442&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2442%2E434096%2ERW8YB_)**
Thanks,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Not into stickers for some reason, but still want to make a big impact before our August 31 fundraising deadline? [** _Make a donation of $5 or more here to our official Flip Pennsylvania Fund. We’re counting on you, Peter._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28810?refcode=em20210829-2442&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2442%2E434096%2ERW8YB_)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210829-2442-footer-test-ctrl&t=11&refcode2=2442_434096_RW8YB_&akid=2442%2E434096%2ERW8YB_)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

\- Team Cheri Beasley

body:
But by the time you get to this point in the email someone else has already chipped $5. Now we’re hoping you will do the same because that is how we win — together.
#

[**Friend - we’re respectfully asking you to make a $5 donation before our critical end of month deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210829-1-15&t=1&refcode2=754_3935704_Q7k8U1&akid=754%2E3935704%2EQ7k8U1)
Sorry to be so blunt, but we are not on track to hit our $100,000 August fundraising goal so we need your urgent help.
Hitting this goal is critical for two important reasons:
1. The National Sports Shooting Foundation is outspending the NRA to oppose our priorities. We have to be able to keep up with their outrageous spending so our message is heard.

2. We are also still hard at work making sure Congress finally passes background checks into law and appropriates funding for gun violence prevention programs and research.

That’s why we have to ask:
[**Will you make a $5 donation to Giffords before our August 31st fundraising deadline? Your donation makes a big difference in the fight to end gun violence in our communities.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210829-1-15&t=2&refcode2=754_3935704_Q7k8U1&akid=754%2E3935704%2EQ7k8U1)

$5 may not seem like a lot. But by the time you get to this point in the email someone else has already chipped $5. Now we’re hoping you will do the same because that is how we win — together.
Thank you,
The team at Giffords

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=754%2E3935704%2EQ7k8U1) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
