body:
Just recently, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0a62958896414e799b55f6501af841db&_e=RnK_wkyJlg9rZBKE9Rv3MO6FNd8vOmWKeUG2B85GYnkOJLWxyLrdJk5wxq-nDXRbFaHxlNufvwReD_9t08sIrJo9keQ7GeVJrD1rejv9FNICh7adG_FIRX_Id8SSHoysEk1ICXECzhekQg2b3vJNpmw1oPfXLgHmsuI5RGrmB7ml0OT9Qaaa-38YEU--sFEDUA62xqrTEdtfXjo4TTvCU80wS-1SBBJr0meAdTJBofP-nFwllZJ3UBdIQb79pOi-5qGElrinOtJKcdX8B2Wg3nm7y0Qly3eK_w8oFqDoPvUyYszz8O5WMHwAf4h01jsrgoNo6hdREuNtoxqICNdmAOwm8OCSX-ixVpqSyjnukeYUQ1tr6NY1X2loq__kww_G5B16LPgmhzw2yZ7Ty3HOJlbqEF9LFcHbFrIHDNLwW8f-O9g2hpOrWloMdvkxdg71Hjkz_eFIJ8ASMEenw7XxVZpxn7wnXPws4egh_JRRz3SLFnVYLo-_MGDSxVwt_WmWg0hywnkwet3GecVX1Jfuzp8EmqCls0MQ9n93eRLYGZ7SLIccmwgBS0uftDwJ_BXbBDRT6wMi-3wQGgFUprNHx1hYnn7-gu9lA1zuT_N3VWA%3D)
---

Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0a62958896414e799b55f6501af841db&_e=RnK_wkyJlg9rZBKE9Rv3MO6FNd8vOmWKeUG2B85GYnkOJLWxyLrdJk5wxq-nDXRbFaHxlNufvwReD_9t08sIrJo9keQ7GeVJrD1rejv9FNICh7adG_FIRX_Id8SSHoysEk1ICXECzhekQg2b3vJNpmw1oPfXLgHmsuI5RGrmB7ml0OT9Qaaa-38YEU--sFEDUA62xqrTEdtfXjo4TTvCU80wS-1SBBJr0meAdTJBofP-nFwllZJ3UBdIQb79pOi-5qGElrinOtJKcdX8B2Wg3nm7y0Qly3eK_w8oFqDoPvUyYszz8O5WMHwAf4h01jsrgoNo6hdREuNtoxqICNdmAOwm8OCSX-ixVpqSyjnukeYUQ1tr6NY1X2loq__kww_G5B16LPgmhzw2yZ7Ty3HOJvABedqBzQ5djVXaTeGKj48qUGiYz5GV5wL2YLvWhA9JomxBVXHAe272u44Rjqrt8cTiFboqArn1eEe7di6vV9BgA91Io-NPdW2zt7K1jZurBXWqQgzQjzl0yG8svCIo-lfQLbsXhq-QDJ7OxU7bgXNyeQptTX-Q-nJqlSxdUDWGCZ-z5xMpkwAVwG8BHBldhMLt9j-QlyCa9lVeRvzaFgE%3D)
You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. **Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me.**

Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ _**absolute liar**_ ,” and informed me on live TV that “ _**my day will come**_.”

clean_body: Just recently, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush? The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans. Cori Bush , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security. Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting. Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me. Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ absolute liar ,” and informed me on live TV that “ my day will come.” Cori Bush is a REMARKABLE LIAR. She stood right outside my gate with a megaphone chanting “You can’t stop the revolution.” She is the only one in the United States Congress who has vocally advocated for the overthrow of the United States government. Now that I’m running for Senate and gaining traction, Cori Bush is targeting me. She says we can’t stop the revolution, but . letting me know that you stand with me against the Revolution that Cori Bush and the SQUAD are attempting to start. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. name: James Carville
subject: What are we doing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34874082/303326816/-2023814932?refcode=20210829.5_JC_8EL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDJkYzRiNi0wMzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpDXE7U5nuowk4gy6ttmAWOy4wGVLonhQvBCYX9d3k4=)

| | Derek,

I’m emailing you because Terry McAuliffe has just a few days until his critical filing deadline, and he just called to let me know that he’s behind where he wants to be.

This is the absolute _worst_ time to be losing ground — we’ve got to pull it together.

Glenn Youngkin has the entire National Republican Party (including Donald Trump!) behind him. These guys are gonna pour resources into Virginia because they know how important it is for them to win.

Peter,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

| | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Peter, Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush? The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans. Cori Bush , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security. Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting. Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me. Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ absolute liar ,” and informed me on live TV that “ my day will come.” Cori Bush is a REMARKABLE LIAR. She stood right outside my gate with a megaphone chanting “You can’t stop the revolution.” She is the only one in the United States Congress who has vocally advocated for the overthrow of the United States government. Now that I’m running for Senate and gaining traction, Cori Bush is targeting me. She says we can’t stop the revolution, but . letting me know that you stand with me against the Revolution that Cori Bush and the SQUAD are attempting to start. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. name: Derek Marshall
subject: 11 million people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**11 million people.** 11 million people have just been put at risk by the Supreme Court’s rushed and reckless decision to shoot down the federal eviction moratorium. In the partisan ruling, all 6 conservative judges decided that the CDC does not have the authority to call for a moratorium and ensure housing for 11 million people currently at risk.
Instead, the Supreme Court says that Congress must authorize an eviction moratorium. **And with the Senate evenly divided, 11 million people now hang in the balance. **

If I was in Congress instead of Rep. Jay Obernolte, I would be working with progressive champions like Congresswoman Cori Bush to push both chambers to pass this crucial legislation. [**If you believe that’s the kind of leadership we need, invest in my campaign with a $15, $25, or $50 donation today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34874829/303329504/195484125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjIyOTJlNy0wNzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BVtLhHhyGM2AJuynJVRE6yFaAfwxa_0FLZi8ZrPW4Tk=)

**I’ve said it before and I will say it again. Housing is a human right.** There’s no reason why the richest country on earth can’t afford to house and protect every person in this nation. While the Supreme Court ruling is a major setback, we won’t stop fighting.

The eviction moratorium is just one part of our fight for housing justice. And I’m in that fight for the long run. [**This campaign relies on grassroots support all over the country to keep going. I’m asking for your support today, so I can fight for you in Congress tomorrow. Can I count on you?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34874837/303329507/195484125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjIyOTJlNy0wNzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BVtLhHhyGM2AJuynJVRE6yFaAfwxa_0FLZi8ZrPW4Tk=)
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

clean_body: Don’t let it happen, Peter. | Trump-Endorsed Senator Tim Scott has been working around-the-clock to defend President Trump’s America First Agenda in the Senate, but the Democrats are raising untold millions to defeat him and secure their majority. If we don’t secure 2,725 new donations by midnight tonight, we likely won’t be able to keep up with the Democrats and defend Tim Scott’s must-win Senate seat! | | | | | | | | | | We won’t lie to you, Peter: we expect the fight for the Senate Majority to be close. Too close for comfort, in fact. That’s why it’s so critically important that we keep pace with the Democrats in terms of fundraising. Falling behind could mean fewer door-knockers, fewer ads, and fewer chances to reach out to the voters that will be crucial in deciding the fate of this race. | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for whatever you can do.. Critical Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Biden must resign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
25th Amendment? | Did you watch Joe Biden's address to the Nation about his failure in Afghanistan? So many things were just...wrong.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210022:6NLcVQ2HN:m:1:3253819041:2642935552863B783B00B4F605F8EAE8:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210022:6NLcVQ2HN:m:1:3253819041:2642935552863B783B00B4F605F8EAE8:r)

Peter,

Did you watch Joe Biden's address to the Nation about his failure in Afghanistan? So many things were just...wrong.

Biden blames everyone else but himself - including my father who did nothing wrong. I'd say it's **unbelievable ...** _but it 's actually not at all unbelievable, unfortunately._

If the first 7 months have been THIS BAD, imagine what Biden can do with the remaining 3.5 years of his presidency. **It 's time for Joe Biden to resign. If this disaster occured under my father, every Democrat and fake news reporter in the country would be calling for the 25th Amendment.

Maybe it should be used on Joe?

One thing is for certain though, he is not fit to be OUR President, and something must be done. **

_You can INCREASE your impact by 300% when you step up NOW._

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to DEMAND Joe Biden resign IMMEDIATELY and your gift will be increased by 300%.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210022:6NLcVQ2HN:m:1:3253819041:2642935552863B783B00B4F605F8EAE8:r)**

[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $400 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210024:6NLcVQ2HN:m:1:3253819041:2642935552863B783B00B4F605F8EAE8:r)

[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210026:6NLcVQ2HN:m:1:3253819041:2642935552863B783B00B4F605F8EAE8:r)

Joe Biden didn't take any questions at his press conference because he's not capable of it. If you watched him struggle through the speech, you could see it in his eyes: there's nothing behind them, no one is home, and it's likely that he took days off just to be able to muster the energy to get through that BS.

I'm going to call my father with the list of patriots who called for Biden's resignation - can I tell him you stepped up?

**[Contribute $25 or more IMMEDIATELY to DEMAND Joe Biden resign and to claim your 300%-IMPACT.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210025:6NLcVQ2HN:m:1:3253819041:2642935552863B783B00B4F605F8EAE8:r)**

Thank you,

clean_body: We have to break through, Peter. | Peter, This is OUTSTANDING news! The latest polls from NBC News show that Republicans have TIED the Democrats in a “Generic Ballot” ahead of the Midterm Elections. In early July, polls showed Democrats with a 7% lead. This is the time for us to double down and build on our momentum, Peter. If we meet our goal: We’ll build incredible momentum and surge ahead in the polls. The Democrats will never recover! If we fall short: The Democrats will recover in the polls and build a lead ahead of these must-win Midterm Elections. That’s why it’s so important that you chip in today -- even if it’s only $5! | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: OcasioCortez.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
While August was busy legislatively, it was one of the slowest months for fundraising.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210829-2382-header&t=1&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)
August was busy.
As we deal with humanitarian crises, a surge in COVID cases, and negotiations over the $3.5 trillion budget, Alexandria’s voice has never been more essential in the halls of Congress.
**But while August was as busy as can be legislatively, it was one of the slowest months for fundraising we’ve had in years on the campaign.** That has us worried, because our job is to ensure we have the resources we need to _keep_ Alexandria there in Congress fighting for us.
We need to make up for some lost ground to keep on track with our budget. So today, we’re announcing a goal to raise $120,000 before the month is up. That’s the target we’ll need to hit in order to close our gap and head into fall — when this re-election race will really start to pick up — with the strongest momentum possible.
**Our records indicate you haven’t donated this year — and that’s totally fine.** We don’t expect everyone to be able to chip in all the time.
But, we’re specifically reaching out to you now because based on what we’re seeing, the only way we’ll have a shot to reach our end-of-month goal is if enough of our grassroots supporters make their first donation of the cycle today. Otherwise, we could fall short and have to make adjustments to our budget.
[**Can you make your first donation to support Alexandria’s re-election today? $3 or anything you can pitch in will make an incredible difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210829-2?refcode=em20210829-2382-P_FND_EOM_LGP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2382_2526796_gsJufQ&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)
**[Make your first donation>>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210829-2?refcode=em20210829-2382-P_FND_EOM_LGP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2382_2526796_gsJufQ&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)**
It’s common to see a dip in fundraising over the summer before election year. But we didn’t expect the dip to be this deep, and that’s why we’re setting this bigger end-of-month goal to help us close the gap.
With all that’s going on in the world, it’s never been more important to secure Alexandria’s place in Congress fighting for all of us.
Thanks for being part of this movement. None of this would be possible without the time, talents, and financial support you all bring to Team AOC.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210829-2?refcode=em20210829-2382-P_FND_EOM_LGP&t=6&refcode2=2382_2526796_gsJufQ&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210829-2382-P_FND_EOM_LGP&t=7&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2382%2E2526796%2EgsJufQ)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Chief James Craig
subject: shocking poll in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
Michigan has had enough of politicians that act like kings and queens, with one rule for the masses and another for the elite. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c302%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=UrdJQKNi0BYKE9Vy4XkGng&sysid=1)
| |
---

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65200%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4XaWj7HxuKFXomOq9UjqFw&sysid=1)

|
---
Friend,

Michigan has had enough of politicians that act like kings and queens, with one rule for the masses and another for the elite.

**And now a new poll out this week proves it: in a head to head matchup between Gretchen Whitmer and myself, the Michigan governor race is a dead heat.**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65201%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J8z3QBXuUzRHDwjtPe59bQ&sysid=1)

_It’s why this race is already attracting national attention. And it’s why Tucker Carlson invited me on his show._

We talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and I couldn’t be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_“When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn’t burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters.”_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65202%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w5lYrOfgC9TqkvcUSwdrCw&sysid=1)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

When police aren’t funded, when police aren't supported, it’s the citizens who suffer.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65203%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4e4CQsH0bcEScNwjKPNaqg&sysid=1)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Friend. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65204%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8zXA4X68r1rVhSNMUzucxA&sysid=1)**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65215%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PkSKhydL6dDWM1hIpUT7HA&sysid=1)

[** LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65216%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XfEZZCjPJS5X7UbeJWzddQ&sysid=1)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I’m a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65217%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g22lxSFBeMbY1LkuDF28dA&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65218%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S%2bS2lgzVt3DNYmUg%2fS9VAg&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65219%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NCp%2bC3f8zBl3L7BZRpsp2Q&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65210%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Op1kvd5CmheYNqewFsTawQ&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65211%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ntFzG64MSuGpUDIyNkPljg&sysid=1)
_**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65212%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oft%2bfmO0a%2f7jwF71ItoGMw&sysid=1)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I’m not a politician, I’m a police officer. I’m starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated:**[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-174902](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65213%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ATXOxOsQH9MWK0UqkxsQBw&sysid=1)**_

---
Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c302%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=UrdJQKNi0BYKE9Vy4XkGng&sysid=1)

See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs. When police aren’t funded, when police aren't supported, it’s the citizens who suffer. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. But there's more to the "why?" than that. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. I don't see much of that out there. So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Friend. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I’m a Republican. I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values. And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!" I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth. Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values. When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time. And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Chief James Craig Former Detroit Police Chief P.S. I’m not a politician, I’m a police officer. I’m starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle. | | | Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 | | | | | | | 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Team | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34877621/303337239/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210829eom2_gs_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTMxNzgxNS0xNDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HuPTN0TQkG6tq3ClIrTSO1fnEQE_f7txB1_owDTglY=)
---
Hey there, I'm Geoff, Ras's campaign manager. I wanted to take a minute to say hello, thank you for all of your support so far in this race, and tell you about the road ahead. Already, Ras is traveling across Iowa to meet and hear from people like you, while continuing to fight for Iowans’ best interests in the state legislature. We may be in the beginning stages of this race, but things are already starting to heat up with another candidate jumping in this month. To be honest with you, campaigns take a lot of money to run. Everything from staff like me, to yard signs, to radio, print, and TV advertisements, to the gas money it takes for Ras to travel across the state — it all costs money. That’s why we’re working to build a strong foundation early on, and why it’s absolutely critical we hit our fundraising deadlines. The next big one is coming up just two days from now on August 31. I know Ras has what it takes to bring people together and be the leader this state needs to move forward. But he can’t get there without the help of grassroots supporters like you, pitching in $10 or $25 whenever you can spare. **[So, before the month ends, can you chip in a couple of bucks to support Ras for Governor and help us reach our August goal? Everyone here on Team Ras really appreciates it!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34877622/303337240/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210829eom2_gs_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTMxNzgxNS0xNDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HuPTN0TQkG6tq3ClIrTSO1fnEQE_f7txB1_owDTglY=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Our Fight (MUST-READ)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5aeaf15ff9f7438d/85fe353a82474e54c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, My team has reached out recently, and I wanted to touch base personally today in case you missed their emails. _I’m so grateful to have you on Team Hern at this CRITICAL time!_ I’m sure you’re following what’s happening in Washington and feel the same utter dismay that I do. These far-left radicals running the show today in Washington are NOT the Democrats of yesteryear. Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi are determined to “transform” our great nation and secure permanent power. And at the same time, our country’s standing on the world stage is rapidly diminishing under Biden’s failed leadership. It’s embarrassing and inexcusable. **The good news is we can BREAK their grip on power next November.** We only need to FLIP FIVE SEATS in the U.S. House to elect a new Republican majority! Will you take a stand today to restore balance and accountability in Washington? [**Tap or click to pitch in $5, $10, or $25, or more if you can >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5aeaf15ff9f7438d/7c005cea2892aaa9c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Our efforts are critical to the fight for Republican victory, here in Oklahoma and across America. This is a TEAM EFFORT to save our country from runaway taxes and spending, open borders, far-left power-grab schemes like court-packing, and the most extreme assault against individual liberty (including our Second Amendment rights) that we’ve ever seen. Our mission is clear, and it’s all hands on deck. EVERY donation is a huge help. [**Please make your first grassroots donation today to support our fight at Team Hern.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/5aeaf15ff9f7438d/29da31d5efcd9046c3d6b838967d376c/34143) **Take a stand now to help END this slow-motion disaster in Washington!** Thank you in advance for any contribution you can send. name: Tim Ryan
subject: Change is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
We believe that emails are the best way to stay in touch with supporters
like you. If you wish to be removed from our mailing list, though, you can
unsubscribe [ https://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=713%2E3611125%2EWawday ]here.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=713%2E3611125%2EWawday ][IMG]

Friends,

It's Tim Ryan. I'm about to ask you to [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/100?t=1007&akid=713%2E3611125%2EWawday ]chip in $25 or more to power my
campaign for Senate here in my home state of Ohio, but first let’s talk
about why I knew I had to run:

Everyday folks used to have a promise they could count on.

If you worked hard, you’d be able to keep a roof over your head, put food
on the table, and provide a better future for your children and their
children too.

But somewhere along the line, our country lost sight of how to make things
work for everyone. We ended up with an economy and a political system that
only works for the wealthy few -- while the working class folks who dug
the deepest and sent our nation soaring were left behind.

Something’s got to change. I’m running for Senate because it’s time to hit
the reset button in Washington and finally cut workers in on the deal.

But Ohio will be a battleground state for 2022, and we’ll be facing an
uphill battle against Mitch McConnell and his dark money friends. It’s
critical that we hit the ground running -- [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/100?t=1008&akid=713%2E3611125%2EWawday ]if you’re with me, will you
make a contribution today and become a Founding Donor of my campaign?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/100?t=1009&akid=713%2E3611125%2EWawday ]Become a Founding Donor >>

I was born and raised in a blue collar union family in Northeast Ohio.
I’ve seen firsthand how our communities have been left behind as the
American Dream gets further and further out of reach.

That’s why I’ve spent my career in Congress fighting to ensure that
everyone can have a good-paying job, quality health care they can afford,
and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity.

I’m running to be Ohio’s next senator because I’ll fight like hell to cut
workers in on the deal.

This is our chance to expand our Democratic majority in the Senate. This
is our chance to make sure that workers and families get the fair shot
they deserve.

I’ll never sell out our workers, but I can’t take on McConnell and his
special interest fundraising machine alone. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/100?t=1010&akid=713%2E3611125%2EWawday ]Chip in $5, $10, $15 $25 --
whatever you can -- to power our campaign!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/100?t=1011&akid=713%2E3611125%2EWawday ]I'm in!

I’m so grateful to have folks like you in my corner. Change is coming --
and we’re gonna do it together.

Let’s get to work,

Tim Ryan

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

Hi there, folks — It’s been great having Michael back home. We’ve gone for long walks and cooked meals at home with the girls. And he’s travelled around the state hearing from Coloradans, from Glenwood Springs to Pueblo. Because Michael is focused on these Colorado conversations, there’s not a lot of time for fundraising. So, he’s counting on you to help meet his fundraising goals this month. Michael refuses to take a dime from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists, team. In fact, over **_90% of his donations last quarter were small donations_** from hard-working folks like you. Last month his average online donation was $18.92. [**Whether it’s $3, $10, or $18.92, please pitch in whatever you can. Michael is fighting for the next generation and to make sure our economy works for everyone. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | If California Governor Gavin Newsom LOSES the recall... A Trump Republican will replace him. It could devastate our entire Democratic Majority! 1. Big Money Trump Donors are flooding Gavin’s opponents with cash. 2. Now Gavin Newsom is in trouble -- his poll numbers just PLUMMETED! 3. If Gavin loses, an anti-science Republican could RUIN California! Just imagine someone like Ron DeSantis as California Governor. DISASTER! | Hurry and sign, California voters have ALREADY been mailed ballots! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? We must Save America. | Joe Biden has failed on so many accounts - where do we even begin? He gave our enemies all around the World a great and lasting victory...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210618:J9HOKQ2NV:m:1:3253819041:B3AF610332DCBBA34B2E5E96262C13DD:r)

Peter,

Joe Biden has failed on so many accounts - where do we even begin?

He gave our enemies all around the World a great and lasting victory when he unexpectedly and inexplicably _removed our great soldiers from Afghanistan_ before taking out our U.S. citizens and allies.

He abandoned many billions of dollars of highest-grade Military equipment.

Leaving our Military till the end was such a simple decision that anyone with intelligence and common sense would have made, but he called it wrong and instantly created perhaps the **greatest embarrassment for our Country in its history** \- and it is far from over.

We need to work EVEN HARDER to **Save America** from Joe Biden and the Left, which is why I'm coming to you now. I need to know you're ready to do whatever it takes to help me put AMERICA FIRST.

body:
An update from Kirsten Engel's Campaign Manager. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879541/303342665/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTE4MWRkZC0xYzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYM1_rMqzyqVBBn7mF7ctdFaD1rF68AT76Jwb4skxc4=&emci=cd15ddd6-5607-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=9e181ddd-1c09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
Kirsten has been all over the district this month: Douglas, Portal, Sierra Vista, Green Valley, Tucson... name the place and Kirsten has been there! She’s been meeting voters and speaking out about the need for real solutions to the climate crisis. She participated in press conferences, met with grassroots climate activists, and moderated a panel discussion about our clean energy future with Congressman Grijalva and EPA Administrator Regan.

This month has been as exhausting as it has been inspiring. I'm fortunate to have a front row seat for all of it. And more importantly, I know Southern Arizonans feel the same way.
Kirsten has been racking up endorsements from local elected officials, national organizations, and most importantly, from everyday Southern Arizonans LIKE YOU!
The goal now: turn this momentum into meeting our end of month goal. this isn't looking good, friend
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879669/303343145/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjFhZTA4Zi0xZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_jIes3LGE4II4Yd3NlnwxUOMNuhBhveq6CMmyJznYM=)

**We expected a surge in grassroots support from folks like you – but with time running out before our critical end-of-month deadline, we took a look at our ActBlue page and saw that online fundraising is dramatically slowing down at the worst possible time.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879671/303343147/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjFhZTA4Zi0xZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_jIes3LGE4II4Yd3NlnwxUOMNuhBhveq6CMmyJznYM=)
An expert at The Washington Post says the best way to overcome the GOP's attacks on our democracy – from voter suppression laws to sham "election audits" – is by kicking Trump-supporting extremists out of power and electing a Democratic governor. **Marco Lopez (D-AZ) is an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner. He's the strong leader Democrats need to flip Arizona's governorship blue and defend our democracy.**
**But unless we turn our fundraising around before our crucial midnight deadline, we won't have the resources we need to win this race and stop Trump and his cronies from taking over our state.**
**[So please, friend, with our end-of-month deadline rapidly approaching, will you rush a donation to close our budget gap, flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879672/303343148/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjFhZTA4Zi0xZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_jIes3LGE4II4Yd3NlnwxUOMNuhBhveq6CMmyJznYM=)**

Team Lopez

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879677/303343153/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjFhZTA4Zi0xZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_jIes3LGE4II4Yd3NlnwxUOMNuhBhveq6CMmyJznYM=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879678/303343154/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjFhZTA4Zi0xZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_jIes3LGE4II4Yd3NlnwxUOMNuhBhveq6CMmyJznYM=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879679/303343155/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjFhZTA4Zi0xZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_jIes3LGE4II4Yd3NlnwxUOMNuhBhveq6CMmyJznYM=)

body:
| | |

Friends – In a moment I’m going to ask you to split a contribution between my people-powered campaign and Maggie Hassan’s. But first, I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. Every contribution to our campaign helps us lay the groundwork for a victory in 2022. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._ **Last month, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And just recently, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and directly attacked our campaign.** So I need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 40,000 contribution goal. **My team tells me we are close to our goal, and if we can get there, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:** **[If you are able, will you split a $5 donation between our people-powered campaign and Maggie Hassan’s? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 40,000 contribution goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879813/303343519/1696179105?refcode=e20210829_mk&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODk1NWI0Mi0xZTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ai_ACm7P_FqvGxJYlP-oMicWLlp3MD1hAfp_aiQM8Uk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34879814/303343520/1696179105?refcode=e20210829_mk&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODk1NWI0Mi0xZTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ai_ACm7P_FqvGxJYlP-oMicWLlp3MD1hAfp_aiQM8Uk=)

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I don’t have a lot of time, but I wanted to send you a brief note
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Hi Friends!

I know it’s late on a Sunday, but I’m just catching up on email now.

Here’s the bottom line: I don’t have a ton of time to focus on fundraising right now because Florida is in crisis. I’m hoping you can chip in before the end of the month to help keep our campaign on track.

See below—Kevin provided more details in his email yesterday. In short, your support now is critical to helping us win next year. If you can, please click here to make a donation to help us finish the month strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=sun]

Thank you for your incredible support.

Nikki

-----Begin Forwarded Message-----
From: Kevin Cate
Date: Saturday, August 28, at 10:21:03 AM
Subject: Let's talk strategy
To: Nikki Fried

Dear Friends,

I’m about to ask you to make a contribution to Nikki’s campaign for Governor. First, I’m going to tell you why.

It’s as simple as this: we can’t wait until next fall to start investing in the one candidate who can defeat DeSantis.

Right now, we know that DeSantis is on track to spend $150 million on his re-election campaign. That’s because he’s been raising money across the country instead of leading our state through
crisis. Most of that will be spent smearing Nikki.

Team, I know we can win this race if we act now to build the organization we’ll need to win. Please click here to chip in now and help us finish August strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=sat]

Let’s talk strategy for a minute. Nikki is the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012. If we hold and expand on our winning approach from 2018, we can stop DeSantis next year.

Folks, you’re the key to getting this done. By investing now, you’re ensuring we can try something new next year with an innovative and aggressive campaign against DeSantis.

I know this election seems like it’s far away, but the work needs to start now. If you’re in a position to give now, please click here to donate before the end of August.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=sat]

Thanks,
Kevin Cate
Senior Advisor

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210988:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210988:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r) Peter, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I'm proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards ' decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by August 31. Will you help me protect students as they begin a new school year -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210988:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210988:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children's minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America's powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you'll see the horrors of what K-12 "learning" has become in modern America. As socialism and "woke" culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as "diversity training"** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their "racist" namesakes**, which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That 's why TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But Peter, I need your support to do it.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210988:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation's **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts' acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation's largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We've published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210989:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r)** ... and we're using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I 'm asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by August 31.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210988:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58210988:JnhaHQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:5CB2C4FFBF4AE905665E6EFA286DBEC1:r) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it's too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](${Gears.unsubscribe\(\)})
---

Folks, I talked a lot about what Kevin McCarthy was and wasn’t doing this month. I did it because it’s important to make sure folks know what he’s actually doing in Washington and what he's NOT doing for communities across the Central Valley. **Here’s the deal, folks.** I may be running against Kevin McCarthy, but I also want to tell you a bit about what I’m running for:
* Health Care: Medicare For All, reproductive justice measures, and capping the cost of prescription drugs
* Jobs: Strengthening and protecting the right to collectively bargain and true economic justice
* Education: Fighting to protect our teachers and domestic workers, making universal pre-K a reality, ending racial disparities in education, and making sure we can pass College For All

And that's just the beginning, folks. This past month, I was humbled to see how many folks chipped in because they believe in better leadership for CA-23. [That’s why I’m asking if you can contribute $19 — our average contribution amount in August — and make sure we can finish August strong. I did it because it’s important to make sure folks know what he’s actually doing in Washington and what he's NOT doing for communities across the Central Valley. Here’s the deal, folks. I may be running against Kevin McCarthy, but I also want to tell you a bit about what I’m running for: Health Care: Medicare For All, reproductive justice measures, and capping the cost of prescription drugs Jobs: Strengthening and protecting the right to collectively bargain and true economic justice Education: Fighting to protect our teachers and domestic workers, making universal pre-K a reality, ending racial disparities in education, and making sure we can pass College For All And that's just the beginning, folks. This past month, I was humbled to see how many folks chipped in because they believe in better leadership for CA-23. Thank you so much for your support, folks. Let’s defeat Kevin McCarthy together, make history together, and bring a new era of progressive leadership to the Central Valley. Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

subject: Mitch McConnell’s plan

body:
Mitch McConnell’s GOP and corporate interests will stop at nothing to take back control of the Senate -- because they do not want to see a government that actually works for its people.
#
Here’s Mitch McConnell’s plan, Peter:
1\. Target every Democrat up for reelection in 2022 for defeat
2\. Take back the Senate majority next November
3\. Undo Democrats’ progress -- and stand in the way of us making any more
**[We can’t let McConnell’s GOP take back the Senate. We need all hands on deck to defend every Democratic seat -- including one right here in Washington state. Will you rush in a $5 contribution right now to reelect Senator Patty Murray and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34882375/303364298/944775873?refcode=pm_em_210829_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzE0Mzc5Ni0yYzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfkiWRj7C3Q80YGXL6E9BPMWGaLPlP3FledaiQsqQjc=)**
We’ve already seen what happens with Mitch McConnell in charge -- _a whole lot of nothing._
Senate Democrats have been using the majority to help Americans build back fairer and stronger from this pandemic, rebuild our crumbling infrastructure, and take urgent action on climate.
But if the Republicans take back the Senate, we can expect obstruction every step of the way.
Keeping the Senate blue is our number one priority in the upcoming elections. **That’s why Patty Murray just set a $15,000 end-of-month fundraising goal --_can you help us get there?_**

clean_body: | | | | Can you help? Friend, They say honesty is the best policy. And we’ll be honest here-- our August End-of-Month deadline approaches, and we’re competing with a financial war chest that Lisa Murkowski and her father have accumulated since he appointed her to his vacant U.S. Senate seat 20 years ago We need your help to outraise Murkowski. We certainly can’t do it without your help. Can you help us reach our goal? Don’t let Lisa Murkowski and her swampy DC Insider friends outraise our Grassroots Conservative movement! With your help, we can FINALLY get Alaska’s seat back from the Murkowski dynasty! Our team greatly appreciates your help, and we know Kelly does as well! Thanks, Kelly for Alaska Finance Team | | | | ==

body:
This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again.
#

Friends —
This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again.
We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true.
That's why we’re asking for $3 before our end of month fundraising deadline comes to a close.
Now, you're probably thinking how can $3 overcome the huge amount of money pouring into Arizona to beat Mark Kelly?
Well, by the time you get to this part of the email someone else has already chipped in $3. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. It all adds up and that is how we win.
What do you say?
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly win reelection? Do it before our critical end of month fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days. This is a time-sensitive request.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210829-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1225_6688874_NDCHAn&akid=1225%2E6688874%2ENDCHAn)

subject: Sacrificing American lives for refugees
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden's Afghanistan disaster keeps getting worse. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/unvetted-2472846?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5d4a529656&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

American troops are now dying so Biden and his globalist friends can flood the United States with untold numbers of unvetted refugees.

How many refugees are headed to America? _Nobody knows_.

Are these people our allies, or do they hate everything America stands for? _We don't know that either_.

And worse, I'm one of the only people here in Washington asking these questions.

The Communist Democrats and the RINOs are perfectly happy letting more Americans die in a Taliban-controlled war zone, so we can bring unknown entities to the United States by the tens of thousands.

It's long past time to evacuate ALL American citizens, and get our troops out of Afghanistan for good.

I'm battling for an America First foreign policy that brings our troops home without delay, and ensures that we NEVER have a quagmire like Afghanistan again.

[**Show me you have my back with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d5a140319b&e=645b3b1338).

[**Anything you can chip in will help me end the Biden Administration's reckless, grossly incompetent Afghanistan disaster**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=694a5348c3&e=645b3b1338).

I thought that after nearly 20 years of war in the Middle East -- which cost us precious American lives and billions of dollars -- we would be able to execute the simple mission of packing up, getting our citizens out, and heading home.

But I guess I was giving the Biden Administration too much credit.

He is either grossly unfit for office -- or worse -- he planned to use American troops as human shields for evacuating Afghan refugees and flooding America.

_Either way, Americans were put last as usual, and this time, the consequences were deadly_.

[**With your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today, I can keep working to put America First in Congress**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=af4850374e&e=645b3b1338).

[**_A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away helps me fight to end this insane foreign policy, and focus on the immediate problems facing our country_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fba6964cff&e=645b3b1338).

But I need your help right away.

We need a massive America First comeback in 2022, and that process starts right now.

We can't let the globalists retain all of the power in Washington, or they will keep invading and destroying foreign lands, and creating more refugees to flood America.

[**Stop them with a generous contribution to my campaign today, and show them you are onto their plan**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=334c205d50&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you in advance for helping me put America First, and end the crisis of unvetted refugees flooding America.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f630c2bd2b&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The Biden administration is sacrificing American troops to make sure Afghan refugees escape the country safely.

_There has never been a more grotesque example of putting Americans last_.

[**Help me fight the Biden Administration's gross negligence with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=730119a125&e=645b3b1338).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Beware of the propaganda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Stay strong |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b8996ff686&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the voice of the grassroots movement sweeping America in every state – Election Integrity.

**From the start, I fought for election integrity paying for critical hearings out of pocket, I have fought to put America’s Audit on the map, and I have fought to keep it safe from personal, political, and legal attacks going all the way up to Merrick Garland and the Department of Justice. And now I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

**_And one by one, they have been defeated and America’s Audit has prevailed, one foot in front of the other._**

And this could not happen without you and me working together. This is why once again I must ask for your help.

**Right now, we are busy fighting the latest challenge, something fairly innocuously called:_NASS Task Force on Vote Verification: Post-election Audit Recommendations._**

Before I dive into this particularly nasty piece of propaganda, I need you to understand something.

We are up against a critical deadline by September first. [While we have raised a tremendous amount of support over the last few days, we are still $8,400 shy of reaching our fundraising goal. We are THIS close.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cd6f8dad59&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6e25d03bdc&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **We need to raise this money to mobilize support, promote America’s Audit and results while we are being silenced by mainstream media, and to make sure our campaign has the infrastructure to weather the attacks that WILL come from all sides – everyone who opposes the sanctity of American Election Integrity!**

[_And this is why I must again ask for your help. Please make a contribution today to ensure that the Election Integrity movement stays strong!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6fe9e7bb95&e=44b8c466b0)

First, let me make clear exactly what the responsibilities of Secretary of State are. Here are a few:
* Act as “Chief Election Officer”
* Certify statewide election results
* Record campaign finances of candidates

You might notice that the position is centered around keeping elections free and fair.

**Well, as future “Chief Election Officer” of Arizona, let me tell you what the Secretary of States are trying to do, in almost unison, to squash election integrity.**

The explicit goal of the NASS Task Force on Vote Verification was to ensure that nothing like “a Maricopa-Style Forensic Audit would ever happen again.”

**Why?**

I will continue to challenge this: Why is a third-party independent audit overseen by the legislative such a bad thing? This is an explicit duty of the legislative.

**Nonetheless, one thing is clear. It is the job of the Secretary of State to protect elections, not prevent them from falling under the scrutiny of the people.**

_This is America. This is a Democracy. This is not the tyranny of a cabal of partisan Secretary of States too scared to have the people take a second look at how shoddily they are running their elections!_

**Preventing Maricopa-style audits does one thing really well: it obscures the fact that there are several really good measures to reduce the need for audits to begin with:**
* **Defect elimination**
* **Multi-factor authentication**
* **Ballot fraud countermeasures.**

Instead, the executive Secretaries of State decided that it was their prerogative to override the duty of the Legislative and the right of the People to oversee the elections.

This joint statement reads:

_The NASS Task Force on Vote Verification encourages states to consider the following recommendations for all types of post-election audits:_

_● States should have a requirement and timeframe, ideally in state statute, for post-election audits in place prior to an election. These defined requirements should include conducting the audit as soon as reasonably possible after an election, as well as a process to recertify election results based on the results of the audit._

_● Ensuring chain of custody procedures throughout the post-election audit process is paramount. Election officials should be able to track the movement and transport of ballots, voting machines, and other election materials through witnesses, signature logs, security seals, video, etc. A break in the chain of custody increases the risk that the integrity or reliability of the asset cannot be restored. The EAC Chain of Custody Best Practices document and CISA Chain of Custody and Critical Infrastructure Systems document should be used as a reference when establishing these procedures._

_● Have state and/or local election officials be an integral part of the post-election audit process, including in the selection of the precincts or equipment to be audited. The involvement of any third-party entities, like a CPA firm, should be determined by the Chief State Election Official or state legislative act prior to an election, and those entities must work closely with election officials._

_● The post-election audit methods and processes must be transparent. This includes identifying who may observe the audit, which should include members of the public, media, political party and/or candidate representatives. Once the results of the post-election audit are completed and certified, they should be made publicly accessible consistent with state law._

_● To avert the possibility of voting systems becoming unusable, states should have criteria in place prior to an election for the use of a federally or a state accredited test lab to perform any audit of voting machine hardware or software._

_● States should make every effort to educate the public on their post-election audit process, as well as other processes and procedures in place to ensure the accuracy and public trust of the results._

**In effect, what these recommendations do is force the People and the Legislative to let the government try and hold itself accountable.**

_This means that in the event of fraud, the expectation of the people should be that the people who are trying to STEAL the election are the same ones who should hold themselves accountable._

**This is ridiculous. This is like the National Association of Bank Robbers coming together to claim that Bank Robbers shouldn’t be arrested, they should hold each other accountable to not rob any more banks.**

This is on its face absurd, and this is why I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona.

**The Secretaries of State agreed on this almost unanimously, which means that almost every Secretary of State in America thinks it is the prerogative of the Secretary of State to take power from the people.**

_I want to represent the people and give power back to the people, which is what I have been fighting for every single day!_

**But nevertheless, we are under attack once again in Maricopa and the Left is trying to squash all possibilities of a nationwide audit in every state.**

[We need to get the word out on the Audit, and fast. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fdad3d3472&e=44b8c466b0) We need resources to protect our campaign from outside attacks. We need to mobilize volunteers. And this takes your continued support.

[_Please donate GENEROUSLY today to support the Election Integrity movement and fight off this next attack. Help us reach our goal of $8,400 by the end of the month!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=974ab8b898&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f21e048ddf&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c790a4cd1a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6b75fcb5e8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6b75fcb5e8).

We need resources to protect our campaign from outside attacks. We need to mobilize volunteers. And this takes your continued support. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. name: Val Demings
subject: Never tire of doing good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
I'm running for United States Senate because I will never tire of standing up for what I believe is right. Never tire of serving Florida. Never tire of doing good. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIalINp2kO0hIbz4hdD2NWZxlvjnm-lxj4ePJ2epH04gC41K-GhX70uA_A3G6O6I1rMJIcrETAlL-TOGIRiHskpdEdNr3mxbJWysY6so2N8mDzaiVN2T7uYheQRjGj3zyjlB620WHDOZ8Kvd2tmiqrzdvmLApmACw89jkMqlGOqzJ5J8txTGwszFZWJ8pbzgDubXEnOEP1QpQuBH9lNwP4bT57pSJqfVRDjfbw7OPDgQQK0G9sEkbmlhwSmLGTfpCQV11tlt7iSVjtONNusbv81Ak7N4lzL6upjYRz-mQYKHd/3ev/NGtsHfnwTi67-RTLcxW09w/h0/vnrrLOQZQRwjNABKPqQ2w0QLIAo653tj5xJSma4zY5E)
"Never tire of doing good, Val."

That's what my mother told me from a young age, Derek. She was a maid, and my father was a janitor. When I was growing up as a poor Black girl in the South, my mother knew I had to have faith in both progress and opportunity – and to never grow tired of fighting for it.

_Never tire._

They're the words I heard every day of my 27 years on the Orlando police force. The words I heard upon becoming the first Black woman to serve as Chief. The words I hear while serving in Congress.

And they are words that I hold close to my heart today, as I tell you this: **I'm running for United States Senate because I will never tire of standing up for what I believe is right. Never tire of serving Florida. Never tire of doing good.** **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIalINp2kO0hIbz4hdD2NWZx14AV3VMfPzavkc2iZYut8NKnV9gzilbW9sC87hA-3jmWXyGDYHmN8yakgA1mERx9F4yGFAugmfqS7AxBgJMqx1dU-ACNY4IP6GISzszroQG0H3pBp6J-7I5VTdJhVwVPp9JzdWsDQLoCrR3-xoag2vAvDrxRtmsimaOxVKNQisJfudyitEJ3OwtXpMsLVKcvYkJnS_-YajCnaivcE10rkgt1dLyLY22RlphGHzF04vbShMUIvqjoPwpVaROJiz5_1l4IZCJ8aApq-JeWCyDta/3ev/NGtsHfnwTi67-RTLcxW09w/h1/BHyIGDVFc_inw3i6gM77VTFlYjKn3Y1v1IP5WuvcMUA)** But to win, I need you. I need every last bit of grassroots support. I need a movement that will flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority.

**[Will you split a contribution between Common Good VA and my campaign to help us win in Florida and defeat Marco Rubio? Floridians should have real leadership.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIalINp2kO0hIbz4hdD2NWZx6DDO08bVr-8P43_WwOx4rThdHaRbVZ9vLgsebczd53PqP99jpuWJI-aX6D68NVG6st3DDfRAFopn4dy5tAS4yhUSVbb-JswdaC3FijXxW0PR_dL1C3UOrpBSUU6MEOfXlEaiw8goJ67BMU5NBizShYTd8zbvillrZ1-LKwXgcJW-Tj4O7GyXu3T__hAbRcVYyx4QYnuJ8brMnLxgzmVTFjK4Sy-6A4T87QOYsKJAMjotuANj9NTIEmY675ouiz6S_cLDL_M0dUuY3K_kPi8Xl/3ev/NGtsHfnwTi67-RTLcxW09w/h2/q8F3VZpqOqe8SOoFoF0-PPRvrUuqHIVODSzSzXOFEwk)**

My mother also taught me this: When someone gives you an opportunity to do something big – do not disappoint them. I'm ready for this moment. Let's win this together.

Congresswoman Val Demings

P.S. CNN is already calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip.**_Just 10,033 votes_ decided the last Senate race in the Sunshine State! [Can you split just $25 right now between Common Good VA and my campaign to make sure we can hit the ground running to win in Florida and defeat Marco Rubio?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIalINp2kO0hIbz4hdD2NWZwMjsu9F-CPfiN2KihevF4AdoGDxQrvj3tQWRX4sq6uYNvzErNFiCYu-XvuxteasD9je2QCTm3RnLDNZdtwzOhRSTLWZ6p8apLWjfqHqUimLGpTu2rP7rfN6uwez2Wx4niLQNKnK0k896VUmV7EL8TzudXX7jgwfLAVBYjY6oPIvvo0TcG2Rqx3TB_uQ57DF5nWCyPILVuHo0Pc5QXwV9Du_3iUh9E8tmD7fk7r37vHPIMuLbYB1KFUSSLy44xuQYfh-07lsSpI8Wmy1NWV0jJ0/3ev/NGtsHfnwTi67-RTLcxW09w/h3/TdRNvE3BcmE70qI7aHuQ5YNdJ8AvkOYFkVpXYC5Ozeo)**

body:
| | | I'm in disbelief.

**Fox News has been bragging that Republican donors are FLOODING GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy with cash to destroy my House Democrats and retake the Majority.**

First, McCarthy announced he raised **$43 MILLION**.

Then, he wrote a check to House Republicans for **$11 MILLION**.

**[So now, I 'm calling for 11,000 more gifts before my End of Month Deadline to overcome the GOP's haul and protect our Democratic Majority. Will you rush $3 to defend my House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 8/31, MIDNIGHT
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecpP-)
---

I cannot emphasize this enough:

Our House Majority is razor-thin.

And McCarthy only needs to unseat **FIVE** of my Democrats to take back power.

**I refuse to let that happen -- but I can 't fight his massive cash advantage without your support. **

**[This unprecedented situation calls for a historic surge of help. I 'm calling for 11,000 more gifts before my 48-hour End of Month Deadline to protect our Democratic House Majority. Can I count on you? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)

Nancy

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19.
